entry.title: Re: Why can't I use Account dimension in the editor for C...
entry.content:
Account dimension behaves similar to a measure.

1. You can create Restricted account

 


Or you can use this function in Calculated Measure.

 

Need more details on the requirement.

Margit

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Tutorial: Creating a custom AI agent on the BTP
entry.content:
Thanks for bringing that up @Cocquerel. I forgot to mention that in the text and will add it soon.

The comments inside the individual tools/functions are not just for us humans. They are also picked up by the agent to understand what each function does, which input it requires and what it returns. That's already sufficient for the agent to decide whether and how to use each tool/function. Here the comments from the get_invoice_status() as example. 

"""Returns an invoice's status, ie whether it has been paid or not.

Args:
invoice_id: The invoice id
"""

entry.title: Re: Fieldglass Rates 2.0 Custom Lookup Question
entry.content: Did you gather any info related to this key in the Rate Custom Lookup? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Peering Options for SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi @stag_pune,

1) SAP BTP does not support vnet peering. However, we do support Private Link: https://help.sap.com/docs/private-link/private-link1/what-is-sap-private-link-service - maybe this could help you in this use-case?

2) Cloud Connector is usually only a hard requirement if you want to pull data from systems that are not directly connected to the Public Internet. It is not generally needed and therewith also not needed for a peering setup as described above.

entry.title: Re-activation of the Credit management
entry.content:
We have a little Problem with the re-activation of the Credit Management. In the documentation it says that a ticket with SAP has to be opened.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Re-activation of the Credit management
entry.content: Activating SAP Credit Management after having previously deactivated it in the configuration step Deactivate SAP Credit Management (SSCUI 101015) should not be an issue. You can deselect the checkbox to activate SAP Credit Management.

entry.title: Re: api_warehouse_order_task_2
entry.content:
Hi @Ajit_Routray, Thanks for answer and I know about this way and in documentation about this API we have this recomendation:

in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c46da892efa14cea8347e9b872199d6f/a4dcec7056134b2fa9b311e5726d25d2.html?locale=en-US

We can use unassignment. assignment, get and then post and I think the better will be use get and post

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager GIS
entry.content:
Technical objects are linked between SSAM and GIS based on a mapping table if not using SAP Geo Enablement Framework on S4.  For technical Objects you will need to upload/maintain the spacial ID to Technical object number. 

Mapping can be handled using standard mapping table '/SMFND/OID01_GS', utility program '/SMFND/GIS_OIDMAP_UPLOAD_PROG' is provided to allow managing the mapping table using a tab delimited text file.

For Orders and Notifications this can also be done or configure a feature to take the Geo coordinates from the the Tech object assigned to the Order / Notification header. 

At runtime SSAM int he backend (MAIF) will look at this table for the current users objects and request the Coordinates from GIS based on the Spacial ID's. then will send these responses to the Mobile app for plotting on the device Map. 

If using GEF, this logic changes slightly as we can now get this info from Inside SAP S/4 and don't need the call to ESRI ArchGIS any more. 

You can find all the config details int eh help doc: Geospatial Service Definitions | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Advanced Return Management / Scrapping with movement type 551
entry.content:
Hello all,
we are facing following issue:
One of the logistical follow up activities we want to use is "transfer to scrap". However, the point is we cannot use it, due to some specific characteristics of the movement type 551. It requires a reason code. I would like to change it to the "not mandatory", but we need it for other process.
Question:
There are two possibilities to solve it.
1. We use a copy of the movement type 551 where the reason code isn't mandatory.
Question: Can I change the movement type used for that follow-up activity to another one?
2. There is a field on the material inspection document where I can enter the reason code.
Is it possible to add the field?
Thanks in advance
Vitali

entry.title: Re: Migrate your code with UI5 linter – Autofix has landed
entry.content:
Thank you for the updates 🙂

We integrade this tooling in our newer project pipelines. This makes it a lot easier to stay up to date and identify deprecated usage during developtment.

Looking forward where this project is going.

entry.title: Embrace Spring with Exciting Updates from the SAP Oil, Gas, and Energy Community
entry.content:
Dear SAP Oil, Gas, and Energy Community,

I am excited to share the release of the March edition of our SAP Oil, Gas, and Energy newsletter, packed with updates and inspiring stories. As the new season breathes life and energy into our industry, this issue captures the essence of the growth and innovation we are experiencing.

🎊 Thank you

I want to extend my heartfelt gratitude to the entire SAP Energy and Utilities team for their ongoing support and dedication in bringing this issue to life and, of course, our vibrant community for being with us throughout the years!

📩 Stay Connected

Let's continue to explore the possibilities and share SAP's transformative impact on our industry. Don't miss out on the next edition! Subscribe now to get the upcoming May Edition delivered directly to your e-mail inbox!

entry.title: Re: onInit hook is not executing from controller
entry.content:
You should see the following error log somewhere:

Attempt to load Extension Controller router.ext.controller.PDMDocumentListActions was not successful. Controller extension should be a plain object.

I.e. instead of:

return Controller.extend(...);

simply

return { ... }:

See also:

  • My other answer at: "UI5 extension of controller and lifecycle methods" - Stack Overflow
  • Documentation "Using Component Configuration" - OpenUI5
  • Documentation "Extending List Reports and Object Pages Using App Extensions" - SAPUI5 Fiori elements

entry.title: Re: How to use Smart Link in Fiori Elements
entry.content: I probably wasn't clear enough, but I want to add the smartLink to all elements in the column "Sales Document" of my table. How would I adapt the <SmartLink> element or controller to do so?

entry.title: proposal tab is not fetching quantity automatically
Where can I start learning how to utilize important features of SAP Integrated Business Planning?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Mastering the Core Functions in SAP IBP  learning journey.

Overview
In this course, you will proficiently utilize some of the most important features of SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP): data integration, Key Figures functions, Change History, and Analytics &Reporting. Join us on this educational journey to enhance your SAP proficiency. 

Learning objectives
Upon completing this course, consultants will be able to effectively utilize SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP) for Supply Chain, demonstrating the skills and knowledge necessary to analyze data through charts, dashboards, and drill-down functionalities. They will also gain proficiency in tracking and analyzing data modifications using the change history feature while efficiently managing the planning area and key figure settings to enhance their data management and decision-making capabilities within the SAP IBP framework.

Prerequisites

  • Exploring Planning Processes in SAP IBP
  • Exploring the Tools & Features in SAP IBP
  • Discovering SAP IBP for S&OP

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Build Process Automation API Trigger, Can't Get Definition ID
entry.content:
I've created a SAP Build Process Automation Process (i.e. a Workflow), with a Trigger of type 'API Call'.  I need to figure out how to call it.  I can't find SAP tutorials about exactly this, but I've pieced together some stuff from various blogs etc. including some 'official SAP blogs'.  They all have a crucial step to find the Definition ID in the 'Monitor->Manage' section (the UIs in the blogs might look slightly different than my UI, but I believe that's due to version differences).  All the blogs show the Definition ID being in a section 'Processes and Workflows' (screenshot below from one of these blogs).  However, when I go to 'Monitoring' (in my version of BPA, this shows sections and tiles, screenshot below), under the 'Manage' section I don't have a 'Processes And Workflows' tile.

If I'm going to the wrong place, I'd appreciate that info.  If the reason the tile isn't showing up is because I missed some step or some role or permission assignment or something like that, I'd appreciate that info.  Really any help at all would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

According to KBA 3562539, the feature is not available yet for the Latest People Profile.

There is an Influence / Enhancement Request for this feature, and you can follow it by accessing its respective URL in the KBA.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Is it possible to calculate the rating below the minimum score in the metric lookup table?
entry.content:
Hi dear community,

My question is about metric lookup table and calculations of goal rating. For example the minimum score in the metric lookup table is 85. We don't want the rating to be 0 or 85 when there is an actual achievement below the minimum score. We want it to give a score between 0-85. Is this possible?

I checked the KBA below. However, as I mentioned above, if "use-min-target-as-rating" is true, the actual achievement will take the minimum value, if false, it will take 0. However, we want a rating calculation other than these.

https://me.sap.com/notes/0002072202

Can I calculate rating when actual achievement below the minimum metric lookup table score?

entry.title: Managing External Content imported via APIs/Excel made easy within Cloud ALM
entry.content:
This blog describes the newest enhancement in the tasks API and Excel upload which allows you to easily bring the external content into Cloud ALM and to effectively track and report on this content.

We frequently have our customers and partners bringing their own content into Cloud ALM either via APIs or through excel upload to manage them as project items. Once the external content is imported to Cloud ALM, the key challenge has been tracking and reporting of these items.

The latest enhancement offers a dedicated source and external reference fields in the tasks API and create/update excel, making it simpler to manage and report on the external content. A combination of these attributes, can be used to:

  1. identify the external content in a Cloud ALM Project
  2. maintain link to the external source

What is offered?

  1. A new Source type called ‘External’
  2. New External reference attributes: External Reference Name, External Reference Id, External Reference URL

How to use it?

When importing the content to Cloud ALM, either via the API or excel, you can use both Source and the External Reference attributes together.

1. The Source attribute offers a fixed value ‘External’ which can be used to identify where the content originated from. We recommend setting the Source value as ‘External’ because you can easily filter the content that you have created via the API/excel upload even using this attribute in the Tasks application.

External as Source in the Tasks API

External as Source in Excel

The Tasks application now offers the source ‘External’ as a filter option whenever there are items existing with this assigned source type. Using this, you can quickly filter the content that is imported into your project.

External Source in the Tasks application filter

2. Combine the Source with the External Reference attributes (ID, Name, URL) to specify the content origin and enable navigation to the specific item in the originating application.

External Reference attributes in the Tasks API

The example below shows the link to the JIRA item embedded within the External Name in the Additional Information of the task created from the excel upload.

 

Exteranl Reference Attributes in the excel

Link to the external object in Additional Information

In the Project Overview you have the possibility to view the progress and status of the content created from the external applications.

Project Overview offers External as a Source filter

Note: There is an 'External ID' field which is available for a long time and was offered for the same purpose of linking the external objects with the project items created in Cloud ALM. You can continue using this for simple integration to find and update Cloud ALM items created from the external application. However, for future use cases, our recommendation is to use these new External Reference fields because you can provide additional context to these external items and easily  track them once they are imported to Cloud ALM.

entry.title: Re: api_warehouse_order_task_2

entry.title: CDS View for Pricing Condition Tables in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project in S/4HANA Public Cloud and am seeking a CDS view for the purchasing price condition tables A901 and A902. Essentially, these tables contain the amount per material for each condition type on either by plant or purchasing organization level.

I found the CDS view I_PurgPrcgConditionRecord, but that contains the condition record, but no link to the material. While I could potentially create a join, I haven’t been able to find a CDS view that connects the condition record with the material.

Does anyone know of a CDS view that includes the data from the A901 and A902 tables, or any suggestions on how to link them to material data?

Any help would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Campinas 2025
entry.content: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/1123843398859?aff=oddtdtcreator

entry.title: Optional Filter Variable appears as Mandatory in OData Service of an Analytical Model
entry.content:
Hello expert.

I have an Analytical Model in Datasphere, which has, among other things, two standard filter variables: one is set as Mandatory, the other one is not set as mandatory, so that it is optional. Nevertheless, when I try to extract Odata from the Analytical Model, the optional filter variable appears as mandatory, so that I must provide a value, otherwise the Odata Service fails.

Is there a way to treat the variable as non mandatory, even in OData Service?

entry.title: Issue with Object Table Visibility in SAP MDK: Blank Space on Page
entry.content:
Hi @Jitendra_Kansal,

I am facing an issue while working with SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK). I am displaying data for two tests for a material using an object table. However, for some materials, only one test is available. To handle this, I have set the object table's visibility to false using a rule on the OnLoad event of the page.

While the data is not displayed as expected, the object table still occupies space on the page, resulting in a blank background. This affects the overall layout and user experience.

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Create an object table to display data for two tests.
  2. Set the visibility of the object table to false using a rule on the OnLoad event if only one test is available.
  3. Observe that the object table still takes up space on the page, even though it is not visible.

Expected Result: The object table should not occupy any space on the page when its visibility is set to false.

Actual Result: The object table takes up space on the page, resulting in a blank background.

Additional Information:

  • I am using SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) for development.
  • The issue occurs on both Android and iOS devices.

Has anyone else encountered this issue? Any suggestions or workarounds would be greatly appreciated!

Tags: SAP MDK, Mobile Development Kit, Object Table, Visibility Issue

Thanks

entry.title: SAP B1 Incoterms fields not copied from Purchase to Goods Receipt
entry.content:
In SAP Business One, when creating Goods Receipt PO related to a Purchase Order, using DIAPI or Service Layer, the fields related to Incoterms (Incoterm, Country, Region, etc) are not copied to the destination document. But the same process, when executed directly in SAP, copy this fields. 
  Is there any configuration that i can make so te fields are copied?

entry.title: Update Address of SalesOrder Partnerfunction
entry.content:
Hi, 

we are currently working on a migration to an S4 Hana System (onPromise).

To implement a special business process, I need to change an address of a partner(function) of an existing salesorder. 
With the old SAP ERP System I used the BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE for this. 
To familiarise myself with new tools, I would like to solve this with RAP. 
I have implemented i_salesordertp and can e.g. change the customer number of the partner.
But how can I change the address of theses customer / salesorder partner function?

Is it even possible?
Or how can I solve this alternatively?

Thanks and best regards,
Helge

entry.title: SAP APM production and Lower Environments (quality, Dev) do not match each other
entry.content:
How to I make sure all SAP APM (Asset Performance Management) environment landscapes match? We need to understand the requirements and implications.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP APM production and Lower Environments (quality, D...
entry.content:
1. If you want environment(s) to be SAP IoT (SIOT) the landscape is either EU10 or US10.
    If you wish to un-subscribe and re-subscribe the tenant must be whitelisted for SAP IoT subscription without which resubscription will fail. To do this raise an incident for component APM-OPS. You must include subaccount and subdomain name of the tenant you un-subscribing from. 

  2. If you want environment(s) to be SAP Embedded IoT (EIOT) the landscape is either EU20 or US20.
    Once you re-subscribe you will automatically be subscribed to EIOT.

  3. If you want environment(s) to be SIOT but the landscape is either EU20 or US20.
    If you wish to un-subscribe and re-subscribe the tenant must be whitelisted for SAP IoT subscription without which the tenant will automatically be subscribed to EIOT. To be whitelisted, raise an incident for component APM-OPS. You must include subaccount and subdomain name of the tenant you un-subscribing from.

To unsubscribe open the SAP BTP cockpit:

  1. Choose Services ->  Instances and Subscriptions in the side menu.
  2. Go the relevant subscription.
  3. Choose Actions  Delete.

Please note: If unsubscribing from the solution, all data related to the solution will be irrevocably deleted.

entry.title: Re: Replace #(hex value) with space
entry.content:
Thanks 

replace all occurrences of CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>CR_LF(1) in 'your string' with space.

This worked for me 🙂

entry.title: Event Mesh IS Subscribe Access Denied
entry.content:
Hi, I'm trying to consume messages from a  SAP Event Mesh Integration Suite queue via HTTP. The exact same setup worked perfectly fine a few days ago.

Publishing via the HTTP endpoint (/messagingrest/v1/queues/{queue-name}/messages) works. But consuming the same message via the HTTP endpoint (/messagingrest/v1/queues/{queue-name}/messages/consumption) returns the following response:

{
    "error": {
        "code": "403",
        "message": "subscribe access denied"
    },
    "message": "subscribe access denied"
}

I tried creating a whole new EM instance + service key + queue (with/without namespace) + topic. Nothing seems to work.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: New Sandbox Available on the SAP Learning Site to Practice Hands-on
entry.content:
@Gurucharancapm 

We don't have a landscape for practicing this scenario in LSC with self-paced learning.

But we have a learning journey, where it is described step by step in Unit 4:  

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/administrating-the-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition

 

And we offer the same LJ as instructor led training.  
https://training.sap.com/course/adm001-administration-of-sap-s4hana-cloud-public-edition-classroom-002-g-en/?filter[country][]=Germany&sort=start_date&limit=100&skip=0

entry.title: Is there a BAPI to Create Automatic Sales Order in Public Cloud with Reference to Sales Contract?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a BAPI that allows for automatic creation of sales orders (with reference to existing sales contracts) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition? The quantity of sales order can be different from that of sales contract.

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a BAPI to Create Automatic Sales Order in Pu...
entry.content:
Hello,

BAPI is not a good recommendation in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

  • Instead, you can consider APIs, e.g., Sales Order (A2A) - Create Sales Orders with Reference (sales quotation is taken as an example here).
  • Another option is to use the "Import Sales Orders" app to create sales orders from spreadsheets. You can import document data to create sales documents with reference to a preceding document. This documentation contains more details: Import Sales Orders | SAP Help Portal.

Hopefully this helps. Feel free to raise any further questions (if there are) under this post.

entry.title: Is multiple SAP backend client integration with SAP Asset Performance Management (APM) possible?
entry.content:
Can more than one backend client be integrated with SAP Asset Performance Management (APM)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is multiple SAP backend client integration with SAP A...
entry.content: Only  1:1 connectivity (S/4 <- APM) is possible. More than 1 will not work and fulfill all the requirements.

entry.title: How to create an event in SAP Build Automation to call Rest IFLOW in Cloud Integration
entry.content: Hello!   We have a project that is being created in SAP Build Automation that will read an email, transform the attachment, and make a REST call to a SAP Cloud Integration IFLOW with a .json body. The Destination seems to be working as we can pull in the list of IFLOW's available.  But we're struggling on how to put the remaining pieces together to complete the process flow.   All of the blogs that I've found to date appear to be from earlier versions as their links are no longer found.

entry.title: Re: Custom Flexible Workflow for Reservation in S/4 Publi...
entry.content:
Hello Jerry,

Thank you for your response. I am familiar with the flexible workflow for PR, but I noticed that there is no standard flexible workflow approval process for reservations.

I wanted to check if there are any possibilities to implement a custom workflow approval process for standard processes like reservations in S/4 Public Cloud.

Looking forward to your insights.

Best regards,
Shankar

entry.title: Download sales order attachments as a physical file (pdf,...)
entry.content:
Hello all
I have a requirement to download sales order attachments as a physical file (pdf,...). Is there a BAPI or API that can be used to do this. We will be doing it in CPI. Does anyone have any experience with this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Restricted measure not having opt...
entry.content: Hi, yes they are. I've created a number of the restricted measures using Date Range on this model in the past. But recently after a data load it appears that I can no longer use date ranges in Restricted measures. I can use them in filters and input controls. But not Restricted measures. The old ones I created prior to this problem are still working and I can edit them. Just can't create new ones.

entry.title: Re: In BAS, ui5-deploy.yaml files in all applications have an "Unable to load schema ..."
entry.content: Hello, same issue, with specVersion: "3.1".

entry.title: Enhance a WebClient UI application to add a new Custom Assignment Block in Manage Service Order
entry.content:
We have Business Requirement, were I need to enhance a standard Web Client UI application - Manage Service Order( App ID: TBT116MSR, UI Technology: Web Client UI, Application Component ID: CRM-S4-SRV-SVO-FIO )

In this, I need to add a custom assignment Block, same as 'ITEMS' block, were I need to show values from the CDS view in that block, and the CDS view Key field will be the Service Document number, So there has to be linked between CDS and the Service Document number.

I am able to add the new custom block using Configurable Areas, but not able to map the CDS with the table which is created from the Page, also for me the 'Add Existing table' is greyed out.

Can someone help me adding a new custom block with CDS view as an table in Standard App?

 

SAP CRM Sales integration with SAP ERP CRM WebClient UI SAP CRM Sales integration with SAP CRM 

ABAP Extensibility

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - How to transition to Shared Environment - getting started
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Couple of months ago we introduced the Shared Environment for SAP Build Process Automation. We described the main benefits compared to the public Environment here and here. We monitor the usage on a monthly basis and see millions of automation jobs and process instances which are now leveraging the Shared Environments.

Let's recap four important benefits:

  • Project-version deployed within a shared environment is always the latest active;
  • Dependencies within a specific shared environment are always the latest and consistent;
  • A powerful sharing capability and privilege definition;
  • Enhanced security with API calls.

Project-version deployed within a shared environment is always the latest active

After deploying a version, the previous version is non-longer "deployed". Previous version non-longer used can then easily deleted from the Lobby.

Let's assume you have a project with 10 versions. The version 1.0.8 is deployed and the version 1.0.9 should be deployed. While deploying this version the previous version 1.0.8 is non-longer activated. Existing tasks - if any - are gracefully finished. If needed (cleaning) you can easily delete the version 1.0.8 which is unused.

 

 

 

When undeploying a project within a shared environment, the workflow definition remains deployed... but inactive. Keeping the history of past instances.

Dependencies within a specific shared environment are always the "latest" and consistent

  • Typical scenario:
    • Let's assume a project A is deployed with a dependent project D1 with version 1.0.40
    • Let's assume a project B is deployed with the same dependent project D1 with version 1.0.42
    • Project A will automatically leverage the dependent project D1 with the version 1.0.42
  • The semantic versioning works for the minor and patch:
    • When attempting to deploy a project C with the same dependent project D1 with the version 2.0.0, deployment will be blocked until the project A and B are upgraded with the version 2.X.X
    • Deploying this project in another Shared Environment is however doable

A powerful sharing capability and privilege definition

A Shared Environment comes with different privileges. By default, a ProcessAutomationDeveloper CANNOT see a Shared Environment by default. All content deployed are not only isolated, but the user cannot see until the Shared Environment admin enables it:

  • Monitor is the minimum right for allowing others to see the content deployed and the jobs
  • View logs is the right for allowing users to see the "context", inputs/outputs jobs
  • Deploy is the right for allowing users to deploy within a shared environment
  • Administrate is the right for allowing users to all tasks mentioned before and the ability to share to others
  • Execute - for enabling the execution of workflow or Decision or Form access
  • Supervise - for enabling the Process Visibility Scenario Dashboard access

Finally, agents belonging to a shared environment will take care ONLY to the projects deployed in this specific shared environment.

With the ProcessAutomationDelegate, you can have dedicated users focusing on monitoring only for example without the ability to create new project.

Enhanced security with API calls and technical user (API-Key)

For calling a process deployed within a shared environment you'll need to use the extra parameter environmentId (leveraging the environment identifier).

API Key is an extra layer of security. There are different rights to fine tune while creating an API Key. API Key requires ProcessAutomationAdmin for security reasons.

How to deploy a project?

  1. First thing to do is to create your Shared Environment and add some users within. Choose carefully the identifier: When promoting the content from a development tenant to a production tenant you might want to keep the name identical across tenants.
  2. From the Studio, click Deploy and you should be able to choose the corresponding Shared Environment
  3. Once deployed the content is now available and can be called

How to start a workflow definition deployed within a shared environment?

Compared to a process deployed within the public environment, an explicit API trigger is needed. Once created for starting in an instance you will need to provide:

  • environmentId as query
  • api-key

Once done, calling APIs will be doable.

Can I deploy within a shared environment AND public environment?

Yes, you can deploy a project within a Shared Environment while keeping the public environment.

You can deploy the same project or different project-version:

  • Project A with version 1.0.41 is deployed within Shared Environment E1
  • Project A with version 1.0.42 is deployed within Shared Environment E2
  • Project A with version 1.0.21 is still deployed within Public Environment

Can I undeploy?

Please note that undeploying a project with Process within the Public Environment will still undeploy and remove all past instances. On a development tenant:

  • Undeploy the project-version "active" within the public environment first to start "clean"
    • All versions will be also undeployed if there is a process
  • Deploy the project within a shared environment

How to undeploy inactive project-versions?

Within the Public Environment, activate the switch "Show inactive versions" for displaying all previous and inactive versions:

Why no longer use Public Environment?

  • All projects deployed within the Public Environment are accessible for the tenant users. That means a user who knows a form url can trigger it.
  • All versions deployed for a given project are deployed "for ever". Cleaning old versions might take more time.
  • When using automation and agents, the jobs are assigned with the agent pool. Shared Environment is more efficient for that end and robust compared to agent attributes.
  • Public Environment will be deprecated and after a transition period:
    • New project won't be allowed to be deployed
    • New project-version won't be allowed to be deployed
    • New jobs won't be allowed to be launched

entry.title: Re: New Pipeline Concept features: integrated runtimes and supporting landscape stages
entry.content:
@MatthiasLechner so far, we do not support namespaces. we will look into this and may implement this for the XI use case. Would have a couple of questions, do you actually have such cases? If so, for XI inbound only or also for other scenarios?

Brainstormed with my colleagues and we discussed the following solution: Either implement this for XI only or in general, in any case we would need to enhance the alternative partner. To be compatible, we would first check if an alternative partner with a namespace exists and if not check for the current entry with a constant schema, or the other way round.

In any case, for maintaining the alternative partners, we could go for the following options, see also screenshot:

  1. Instead of the constant SenderInterface maintain the namespace in the schema, drawback here / is not supported and needs to be replaced by _, and length is only 120 characters
  2. Swap interface name and namespace, i.e., enter interface name in scheme and namespace in ID, advantage / is supported, ID has lengths 255, drawback interface name in scheme doesn't really fit to the option with constant scheme

What do you think would be the best option?

Thanks

Alex

entry.title: IPS - SCIM API V2 filter users by user group assignment
entry.content:
Hi, we have a requirement to filter out users in the IPS sync that belongs to a specific User Group in SF.

e.g.: users assigned to user group "GG-IASSYNC" should NOT sync to IAS.

In the Source system properties, we set up sf.group.filter with value displayName ne "GG-IASSYNC".

While in the Target transformation we added this condition: && ($.groups[?(@.displayName == 'GG-IASSYNC')] EMPTY true)

We are using sf.api.version 2, but the condition above does not seem to work.

How can we write that condition or how can we filter out ousers based on their user group?

Thanks

Marco

entry.title: Export the main process in my SOLDOC to another SOLMAN 7.2
entry.content: I wish to export the main process to another SOLMAN. In my example I wish to copy all the process steps from "Plant Maintenance Master Data".

entry.title: Re: Successfactors Position Management - Transition process in Employee Central
entry.content:
Has anyone implemented this process?  At times, we have to create new positions for new hires who are being hired for someone who is either terminating or transferring to a new position.

We would like to reduce the number of position numbers we have to create for these scenarios.

Please let me know if you have implemented and what are the pros and cons.

thank you!

Kim

entry.title: Re: Custom Flexible Workflow for Reservation in S/4 Publi...
entry.content: Hi Shankar, when you have more details what you want to do and what you have tried, please let us know. But to directly answer, no i don't see one, but if the Reservation follows the PR I would expect you could treat the reservation approval as following/combined with the PR workflow.

entry.title: Open POST CHG creating a positive qty
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an open 922 POST CHG in LS26 causing a positive qty. Stock QTY in all other locations have been confirmed as accurate. How do I clear a positive POST CHG to correct my inventory?

entry.content:
Dear Expert

Were can I find Templates for BluePrint Process Question and BluePrint Configuration for SAP Business One 10.

These documents are mentionned in Page 20 of TB1200 documentation.

Thanks

Boukhary

entry.title: Re: New Extensibility Guide for S/4HANA is available
entry.content:
Hello The document seems in this new location :

https://www.sap.com/documents/2019/05/44b3ebd5-4b7d-0010-87a3-c30de2ffd8ff.html

entry.title: Re: Peering Options for SAP BTP
entry.content:
@marsteg Private link does not support all the services such as Integration suite, Datasphere etc, and we are looking for a comprehensive security solution.

Cloud connector is also not an appropiate solution because it's not truely bidirectional, sending an IDOC to integrations suite from an ECC system happens via the internet and not via cloud connector (correct me if I am wrong). iflow endpoints are also public and not private. I know SAP has edge cell for I/S but does not look very viable. All other vendors have VNet peering options, not sure why SAP can't allow VNet peering.
Do you know what is SAP's solution on such problems?

entry.title: Re: Cancel line item on a customer demand via SOAP
entry.content:
Thanks AJ,

We don't want to delete the line item altogether, just mark it as cancelled.

In any case, I don think we have the relevant permission to do so?

<Log>
    <Item>           <ReferenceObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>USERID</ReferenceObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>
       <Note>Action Code is invalid</Note>
    </Item>
</Log>

entry.title: Last Purchase price in A/P and last landed cost Query
entry.content:
Dear All,

I need a Query for the last purchase price in an A/P Invoice with  Docnum, docdate,Doccur, Itemcode,dscription,  Quantity unitprice and UOM linked to last Landed cost with Docnum, doccur,dscription, quantity, priceFOB, TtlexpndLC and Unitmsr.

 

Not with a date rage. If there is no landed cost available then the landed cost value fields can be empty. Sometimes the company receives the landed cost late. Its how they work.

The reason for the A/P invoice last purchase price is because the currency in the a/p invoice is different from the Local and system currency.

PLease help!!!

entry.title: Re: Download sales order attachments as a physical file (...
entry.content:
You'd be looking to integrate with the following API then because it supports GOS, DMS & DIRs - https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV_0001/overview

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: SAP Customer Checkout & Grow and Rise
entry.content:
Hi team, I'm SAP Customer Checkout presales in Chile, Perú, and Argentina. During the month, I will be looking at two main ERP implementation solutions offered by SAP: SAP GROW and SAP RISE, but integrated with SAP Customer Checkout.

I need your help:

Do you know any customer experience?

Do you know a partner that did implementation?

I'll be happy to receive that support.

Thank

entry.title: Re: Outbound communication from SAP Public cloud to a Web...
entry.content: Hi Ulrich, ok now i understand. I look forward to hearing from you regarding the HTTP Proxy. Normally these things can be configured in the communication system app in the public cloud i think. Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Failure Mode Group In Create Maintenance Request App
entry.content:
Hello @Esnowy ,

Please use Maintain Catalog Profile app, to assign the new code group so that they can be used in the maintenance requests. Please choose the relevant catalog profile.

Hope this helps.

BR,

Vijayalaxmi Melavanki

entry.title: Periodic Postings in Contract and Lease Management
entry.content:
Hi,

The customer in my current project is using Contract and Lease Management for lease-out contracts in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. Is the product able to handle the features for quarterly invoicing listed below? 

- The ability to create multiple invoices in a single periodic posting run (one for each month in the quarter).
- The periodic posting run should affect several periods (months) for the quarter in question.
- The possibility of rebooking the VAT differently depending on when payment is received.

I have not been able to find any documentation regarding periodic postings for quarterly invoicing in Contract and Lease Management. 

I would really appreciate any support that I can get on this topic.

Best regards,

Filip Eriksson

entry.title: The Differentiation - SAP Data Products and Insights Apps in SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
In today's data-driven world, businesses are constantly seeking ways to leverage data to gain insights, drive decision-making, and reduce time to value. Accelerating time to value is crucial for gaining a competitive advantage and staying at the forefront of the industry. While there are many solutions and platforms available in the market to create data products, it is SAP's approach that sets it apart from the competition. SAP Insight Apps based on Data Products in SAP Business Data Cloud are created by domain experts (Line of Business (LOB)), ensuring that they are tailored to meet the specific needs of the industry. With just click of a button business users can be up and running in no time with Insight Apps and Data Products working behind the scenes.This blog will explore why SAP Data Products and Insights Apps are different and where the differentiation lies.

 

Industry Expertise and Understanding

SAP has years of industry experience and a deep understanding of the data that drives businesses. This expertise is reflected in the solutions SAP provides, which incorporate industry best practices, delivered content, and comprehensive support. Unlike other solutions that might just offer platforms or tools for creating Data Products and content on top of them, SAP's approach involves creating Data Products (and LOB specific or Cross LOB Insight Apps on top of them) for you, leveraging the knowledge and insights of domain experts (LOB). This ensures that the Data Products and Insight Apps are not only relevant but also aligned with industry standards and practices.

The SAP Difference in Data Products & Insight Apps

While the term "Data Product" is not new, the way SAP is delivering them is what makes the difference. Many solutions on the market allow you to create Data Products, which is undoubtedly beneficial. However, the key differentiation lies in who creates these Data Products. Other solutions might just offer platforms where data engineers or data modelers create data pipelines, business entities, semantic models, and data products based on articulated needs. In contrast, SAP creates Data Products (and Dashboards - Insights Apps) for you along with data replication flows (data pipelines), leveraging years of strong industry knowledge from LOB experts, ensuring that the products are designed with a deep understanding of the business and its requirements.

The Fundamental Principle

The fundamental principle of creating Data Products is that domain experts (LOB) should be responsible for creating data products. Domain teams own and understand their domain and data, including the information needs of their business. When other solutions allow you to create Data Products, the ownership often shifts to technical teams who may not have a complete understanding of the business or a particular domain. This can lead to Data Products that miss the mark in terms of relevance and effectiveness. Also, not every firm will have capacity from LOB experts/domain experts to sit and design Data Products and Dashboards relevant to them and also relevant to other consumers within the firm.

Real-World Examples

To illustrate the difference, let's consider two examples:

  1. Investing in ETFs/Mutual Funds: When planning to invest money in ETFs or mutual funds, what is the logical approach? Invest in ETFs/Mutual Funds offered by different institutions or investment firms who have years of experience and market information to create ETFs based on various categories, industries, sectors, trends, or top firms. Then, build a portfolio on top of that OR, would one hire financial and market experts, register a firm, get a platform, and create their own ETFs to invest? Similarly, SAP's approach to Data Products and Insights Apps involves using pre-defined accelerators created by SAP industry experts, allowing businesses to build their portfolios (analytics landscape) without reinventing the wheel. In the world of Data Products, would you buy a platform and hire top experts to create your own Data Products (and Insights Apps), or would you opt for a platform where everything is already taken care?

  2. Providing Education to Kids: When it comes to education, would you buy or rent a place, hire the best teachers for all subjects, and create a curriculum for each teacher, or would you send your child to the best school that has already sorted everything for you? SAP's approach to Data Products and Insight Apps is similar to choosing the best school, where Data Products and Insight Apps have already been created and maintained by domain experts, ensuring they are relevant and up-to-date with industry shifts and trends.

Conclusion

SAP's approach to delivering and managing Data Products and Insights Apps in SAP Business Data Cloud is unique and highly beneficial for businesses. By leveraging industry and domain expertise, SAP ensures that Data Products and Insight Apps are relevant, reliable, and aligned with industry best practices. This approach not only saves businesses time and resources but also ensures that these solutions are designed to meet the specific needs of the business.

Thanks!

Harji

entry.title: Re: Field Tax Number 1 in VA01
entry.content: Any solution?

entry.title: stock not confirmed in sales order after ordered stock added with PO creation
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement from client that if sales order is not confirmed with stock when stock is not available then when PO is created, PO stock which ordered stock should confirm line item in sales order.

I have maintained availability check ST in scope of check as below to consider only confirmed stock without RLT and checked with purchased requisitions with purchase order include for STO order quantity.

material also maintained for ST availability check.

when i created sales order where stock was not available and I created PO for the same material, it updated order stock in stock overview for material.

PO is approved and order stock is available but sales order is not getting confirmed.

Can anyone please explain if i am missing any configuration or why this issue is happening?

Thanks in Advanced

entry.title: Re: Annotation to hide criticality variable from UI display
entry.content: May I know the answer, as I have a same requirement where in parameterized CDS view criticality is not working when criticality field is hidden.

entry.title: Re: Proxying as an associate
entry.content: This occurred to me when trying to assist a SUPERVISOR navigate the new learning experience we just made default. When I proxied, I was in the old experience which didn't make sense to me.

entry.title: Re: Completion of third party sales orders
entry.content: Yes Billing relevance should be F and for existing orders, this configuration change will not set right the records. You need to execute report SDVBUK00 and check whether this report will set the right status

entry.title: Re: Financial planning at overall level
entry.content:
It is not possible to only post an overall value because the values are written to the tables where the period is a key field.

You can achieve the requirement by configuring you own Period Type and make it something like 10 years and only use it as the Financial Period Breakdown in all Portfolio Buckets and Portfolio Items.

entry.title: Create Quality Notification via BAPI and fill with respective master data from delivery
entry.content:
Hello,

i am trying to create a quality notification via a BAPI and i am running into the issue, that it is not pulling any master data from the delivery.
I tried the BAPI's IQS4_CREATE_NOTIFICATION and BAPI_QUALNOT_CREATE, but they both have the same issue. When i give the BAPI the input paramters for QMART: Q1 and delivery and position (LS_VBELN / LS_POSNR), it does not pull the respective master data from the delivery.

When i create a normal quality notification via QM01-tcode it automatically transfers the data from LIPK/LIPS (Delivery Tables) to QMEL based on the delivery number and position. (Include MQM00I10 (1.039); MODULE: LIEFERUNG_LESEN)

The only option i would see is move the fields one-by-one in a customer exit form LIPS/LIPK to QMEL...

Why does it not work, when creating a notification via the BAPI since these are all SAP Standard fields/BAPI's/Interactions and is there a way to work around this?

Any help would be appreciated, thank you!
